name: NexusAgent
description: Multi-agent commerce framework on X Layer. Fetches OKB market signals via OKX Onchain OS, makes autonomous execution decisions, and settles bounded stablecoin transfers on-chain.

skills.name: Run Workflow
skills.description: Execute a multi-agent commerce workflow with OKB signal, decision, execution, and settlement on X Layer.

skills.name: OKB Market Signal
skills.description: Get live OKB market signal from OKX Onchain OS Market API.

skills.name: Verify Settlement
skills.description: Verify a settlement proof transaction on X Layer via RPC receipt.
